text:
drug therapy is performed 
before each prescription is dispensed to 
an enrollee in a sponsor’s Part D plan, 
typically at the point-of-sale or point 
of distribution. The review must in-
clude, but not be limited to, 
(i) Screening for potential drug ther-
apy problems due to therapeutic dupli-
cation. 
(ii) Age/gender-related contraindica-
tions. 
(iii) Over-utilization and under-utili-
zation. 
(iv) Drug-drug interactions. 
(v) Incorrect drug dosage or duration 
of drug therapy. (vi)
